name: I18N
description: Lightweight internationalization class for Gravity UI services. Manages keyset-based translation data, supports pluralization via CLDR Plural Rules, template variable substitution, and optional fallback language.
when_to_use: Adding multi-language support to a Gravity UI application
Managing keyset-based translation files per language
Pluralizing strings based on numeric count
Using template variable substitution in translated strings
avoid: ICU MessageFormat / rich text formatting in React — use @gravity-ui/i18n-react createIntl instead
Server-side rendering with complex locale configuration — use @gravity-ui/i18n-node instead
signature: new I18N(options?: { lang?: string; fallbackLang?: string; data?: Record<string, KeysetData>; logger?: Logger }): I18N

parameters.name: options.fallbackLang
parameters.description: Fallback language used when a key is missing in the target language.

parameters.name: options.data
parameters.description: Pre-loaded keysets mapped by language code.

name: I18NFn
description: TypeScript generic type helper that enables type-safe access to translation keys. Cast i18n.i18n to I18NFn<typeof Keysets> to get autocomplete and compile-time key validation.
when_to_use: Adding TypeScript type safety to translation key lookups
Getting IDE autocomplete for keyset keys
avoid: Runtime usage — this is a type-only utility, not a function
signature: type I18NFn<T extends Record<string, Record<string, unknown>>> = (keyset: keyof T, key: keyof T[keyof T], params?: Params) => string
